sourceChannel.description: Source channel Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

messageIdAnchor.description: Message ID anchor, return the message before or equal to this message

withReplyMessage.description: Whether to include reply message details

fieldType.description: Enum description (1:Normal Field 2:Relation Field 3:Nested Field 4:Password Field)

ReplyContent.description: The messages that reply to this message

status.description: The status of the message Enum description (1:new 2:sent 3:failed 4:scheduled)

statusReason.description: The reason of the message status

type.description: The type of the message Enum description (1:message 2:system 3:internal_note 4:side_conversation 5:reply 6:escalation)

sourceChannel.description: The source channel of the message Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

userId.description: The user id of the message

userType.description: The type of the user Enum description (1:customer 2:staff 3:system)

replyMessageId.description: The reply message id of the message

firstFlag.description: The first flag of the message

emailId.description: The email id of the message

signatureType.description: The signature type of the message Enum description (1:personal 2:department 3:none 4:team)

replyByMessages.description: The messages that reply to this message

TicketMessageProcessDto.description: The process info of the message

avgFirstReplyTimeHours.description: Average first reply time in hours

scope.description: Scope for filtering: 'customer' (my tickets) or 'organization' (org tickets), null for auto

dateField.description: Date Field Enum description (1:Create Time 2:Closed Time 3:Activity Time)

items.description: Display Status System Status Enum description (10:open 20:closed 30:archived 40:deleted)

organizationIds.description: Organization IDs for filtering tickets by customer organization (internal use only)

operator.description: Enum description (1:equals 2:not equals 3:contains 4:not contains 5:greater than 6:less than 7:greater than or equals 8:less than or equals 9:is null 10:is not null 11:in 12:not in 13:equals or is null 14:not equals or is null)

thirdId.description: Third-party ID, TMS ID / WISE Org ID

collaboratorFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket involves a collaborator

attachmentFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket has non-inline attachments

fromDirectEmail.description: Indicates if the ticket was created from direct email (system email in To/CC/BCC)

isOverdue.description: Indicates if the ticket is overdue for resolution

isResponseOverdue.description: Indicates if the ticket is overdue for response

isSlaBreached.description: Indicates if the ticket is SLA breached
